title: Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume 8: The Last Siege, the Final Truth
content:
{{Top|rwm|imp|italics=1}} {{ComicCollection |image=[[File:The_Last_Siege.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume 8:
The Last Siege, the Final Truth'' |writer=[[John Ostrander]] |penciller=[[Jan Duursema]] |inker=[[Dan Parsons]] |letterer= |colorist=[[Brad Anderson]] |cover artist=[[Tomás Giorello]] |editor= |publisher=[[Dark Horse Comics]] |release date=[[March 29]], [[2006]]{{DarkHorse|url=Books/13-401/Star-Wars-Clone-Wars-Volume-8-The-Last-Siege-The-Final-Truth-TPB|text=Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume 8: The Last Siege, The Final Truth TPB}} |other date= |media type=Trade paperback |pages=144 |isbn=9781593074821 |isbn2= |timeline=[[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]] / [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]] |series=*[[Star Wars: Clone Wars (trade paperbacks)|''Star Wars: Clone Wars'' trade paperbacks]] *''[[Star Wars: Republic]]'' |issues=72-77 |preceded by=''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume 7: When They Were Brothers]]'' |followed by=''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume 9: Endgame]]'' }} '''''Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume 8: The Last Siege, the Final Truth''''' is the eighth volume in the [[Star Wars: Clone Wars (trade paperbacks)|''Star Wars: Clone Wars'']] series of [[Star Wars comic books|trade paperbacks]]. Volume 8 collects ''[[Star Wars: Republic]]'' issues 72-77. It was published by [[Dark Horse Comics]] on [[March 29]], [[2006]]. ==Publisher's summary== ''While both the Republic and the Separatists have suffered staggering losses during the Clone Wars, nothing could have prepared them for the battle they face on the desert world of Saleucami. Beneath the surface of this Outer Rim planet, the Dark Jedi Sora Bulq has begun cloning an army of Morgukai assassins. Unwilling to leave this grave new threat unchecked, the Jedi and their armies soon find themselves entrenched in a five-month siege. Now, time and resources have run out, and it's up to a crack team of Jedi, led by Quinlan Vos and Aayla Secura, to infiltrate the Separatist base.'' ==Contents== *[[Republic 72|''Republic'' 72]] *[[Republic 73|''Republic'' 73]] *[[Republic 74|''Republic'' 74]] *[[Republic 75|''Republic'' 75]] *[[Republic 76|''Republic'' 76]] *[[Republic 77|''Republic'' 77]] ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume 8: The Last Siege, the Final Truth}} ===Editions=== *{{ISBN|9781593074821}}; [[March 29]], [[2006]]; [[Dark Horse Comics]]; US paperback ===Cover gallery=== File:The_Last_Siege.jpg|Cover File:QuinVos_cw8.jpg|Full cover art ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{DarkHorse|url=Books/13-401/Star-Wars-Clone-Wars-Volume-8-The-Last-Siege-The-Final-Truth-TPB|text=Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume 8: The Last Siege, The Final Truth TPB}} {{RepublicNav}} {{Interlang |ka=ვარსკვლავური ომები: კლონების ომები, ტომი 8: უკანასკნელი ალყა, უკანასკნელი სიმართლე |pl=Clone Wars 8: The Last Siege, The Final Truth }} [[Category:Star Wars: Clone Wars trade paperbacks]]
